data.biography:
Mark Owen (born 27 January 1972) is an English singer and songwriter best known for being a member of pop group and band Take That; as of 2019, the group have sold 14 million albums and 11.4 million singles in the UK. In Owen's solo career, he has released five studio albums: Green Man (1996), In Your Own Time (2003), How the Mighty Fall (2005), The Art of Doing Nothing (2013) and his most recent, Land of Dreams, which was released in September 2022 and debuted at number 5 on the UK Official Albums Chart.

Growing up, Owen lived in a small council house with his mother Mary, his father Keith, brother Daniel, and sister Tracey in Oldham. His father was a decorator, later getting a job at a police station. His mother was a supervisor in a bakery. Owen was educated at Holy Rosary Primary and St Augustine's Catholic Schools, both in Oldham. He had little interest in music and played football briefly for Chadderton F.C., in addition to having trials at Manchester United and Rochdale. Before auditioning for Take That, he worked at Barclays in Failsworth.

After selecting Gary Barlow as the group's lead singer in 1989, Nigel Martin-Smith introduced Owen, Howard Donald, Jason Orange and finally Robbie Williams to the fold. The group were signed to RCA records, and after a number of top 40 hits, eventually secured their first number one with Barlow's "Pray". Previous hits included "A Million Love Songs", "It Only Takes a Minute" and "Could It Be Magic".

The band's debut album Take That & Party was released on 17 August 1992. It reached number two on the UK Album Chart. The following year saw the release of their second album, Everything Changes. It went straight in at number one on the UK Albums Chart and spawned four number-one singles, as well as "Why Can't I Wake Up with You" and "Love Ain't Here Anymore" hitting number two and three respectively. Owen sang lead vocals on "Babe", which was released in December 1993. Their third album Nobody Else went straight to number 1 and was to be their last studio album of the '90s. The album had three number-one singles, including "Back for Good" which peaked at number seven on the US Billboard Hot 100 and was brought forward an unprecedented six weeks before its official release such was the demand for the single. Owen also sang lead vocals on "The Day After Tomorrow" from the album. A Greatest Hits collection followed again reaching number one. The album featured the band's eighth number-one single "How Deep Is Your Love". This was to be the first single released by Take That as a four piece (without Williams) and it was their last single until they reformed in 2005.

Although Owen's vocal contributions were limited in Take That's original run, he was arguably the most popular member of the group, on account of his boyish good looks and sweet demeanour, regularly earning awards such as Smash Hit's "Most Fanciable Male in the World" and "Best Haircut". ...

Source: Article "Mark Owen" from Wikipedia in English, licensed under CC-BY-SA 3.0.
data.name: Mark Owen

data.biography:
Mark Anthony Patrick Owen, né le 27 janvier 1972 dans sa maison familiale de Oldham dans le Lancashire (aujourd'hui dans le Grand Manchester), est un chanteur-auteur-compositeur britannique et membre du groupe pop Take That.

Mark est allé aux écoles Holy Rosary Primary et St Augustine of Canterbury RC High School à Oldham. Son rêve était de devenir joueur de football; il a par ailleurs passé des essais pour des clubs comme Manchester United, Huddersfield Town AFC et Rochdale AFC, mais a été contraint d'abandonner son rêve à cause d'une blessure grave.

Mark prouve déjà en tant qu'enfant ses qualités d'homme de scène et de chanteur, imitant par exemple Elvis sous les applaudissements de sa famille. Mark a travaillé à Zuttis, un magasin de vêtements à Oldham pendant quelque temps, puis pour la banque Barklays avant d'être embauché chez Strawberry Studios.

C'est en travaillant dans ce studio qu'il a rencontré Gary Barlow, avec lequel il s'est tout de suite bien entendu. Ils ont commencé à faire de la musique ensemble et se sont fait remarquer par Nigel Martin Smith, futur manager de Take That.

Pendant les années Take That, Mark était le plus populaire du groupe. Il gagna multiples awards pour le garçon le plus sexy, le plus beau sourire, la meilleure coupe de cheveux, etc. Il chanta peu en meneur principal, mais eut néanmoins un #1 avec Babe, et chanta également sur la ballade The day after tomorrow sur le 3e album des Take That.

Après Take That, Mark a été le premier des anciens membres à sortir un enregistrement solo. Il a atteint la 3e place des charts britanniques avec son single Child. Son second single Clementine a également été classé à la 3e place des charts. En 1997, il sort son album Green Man, atteignant la place #33 des charts. À la fin de l'année 1997, après un autre single I am what I am qui se classe #29 dans les charts, Mark est renvoyé de BMG Records. Après six ans hors des projecteurs, Mark a gagné la seconde édition de Celebrity Big Brother en 2002, qui lui a permis un regain d'intérêt de la part des médias, et par voie de conséquence un contrat avec les maisons de disques Island/Universal. En août 2003, Mark est réapparu dans les charts du Top 5, avec Four Minute Warning qui est resté 8 semaines dans le Top 40. Son second album In Your Own Time, est sorti en novembre 2003 et a été classé #39 dans les charts. Après un second single Alone Without You, classé #26, Mark est renvoyé de Island/Universal. En avril 2004, il établit sa propre maison de disques, Sedna Records Ltd. Il sort ensuite son troisième album solo How The Mighty Fall, dont est issu le single Hail Mary, sorti en février 2005.

Après la séparation décennale de Take That Mark Owen a achevé une tournée complète avec eux acclamée par les critiques. Ils ont notamment joué à Milton Keynes devant 70 000 personnes en juin 2006. Le nouvel album des Take That, Beautiful World sorti le 27 novembre 2006 fut #1 à travers l'Europe et marque définitivement le retour du boys band. Mark y chante en solo sur les chansons What you believe in, Hold on et Shine (#1 en 2007). Une grande tournée des plus grandes salles européennes débute en octobre et passe par l'Irlande, la Grande-Bretagne, l'Italie, l'Espagne, l'Allemagne, la Suisse, l'Autriche et les Pays-Bas. ...

Source: Article "Mark Owen" de Wikipédia en français, soumis à la licence CC-BY-SA 3.0.

朱铁和，1949年出生于香港，香港男演员。

1970年代后期活跃至1990年代中期，外形粗犷，擅长演出武侠剧，忠肝义胆的侠士、以及阴险狡诈和愣头愣脑的角色都能出色演绎。内地观众较为熟悉的是港剧《94射雕英雄传》中的欧阳锋和《十三妹》中的纪献唐。他还出演了几部电影，其中最为出名的要数《唐伯虎点秋香》中的宁王使者了，特别是他的“红烧鸡翅膀”之歌给人留下了深刻的印象。
data.name: 朱铁和

data.biography:
朱鐵和，1949 年出生於香港，香港男演員。

1970 年代後期活躍至 1990 年代中期，外形粗獷，擅長演出武俠劇，忠肝義膽的俠士、以及陰險狡詐和愣頭愣腦的角色都能出色演繹。內地觀眾較為熟悉的是港劇《94 射鵰英雄傳》中的歐陽鋒和《十三妹》中的紀獻唐。他還出演了幾部電影，其中最為出名的要數《唐伯虎點秋香》中的寧王使者了，特別是他的“紅燒雞翅膀”之歌給人留下了深刻的印象。
data.name: 朱鐵和

data.biography: Michael Kiettisak Vatanavitsakul is an actor, model and YouTuber under Change2561. He got his bachelor's degree in business administration majoring in finance and banking at Assumption University.
data.name: Kiettisak Vatanavitsakul
基蒂萨克·瓦塔纳维察库
基蒂薩克·瓦塔納維察庫
キエティサック・ヴァタナヴィツァクル

data.biography:
Michael Kiettisak Vatanavitsakul é um ator, modelo e criador de conteúdo tailandês sob o selo da agência Change2561. Formou-se em Administração de Empresas, com especialização em Finanças e Bancos, pela Assumption University. Sua base acadêmica em finanças é um traço marcante que ele concilia com sua carreira artística e sua presença digital.

Michael iniciou sua trajetória ganhando popularidade como YouTuber antes de migrar para a atuação. Ele conquistou reconhecimento internacional ao interpretar North na série BL de sucesso "Pit Babe" (2023). Sua química com TopTen Supakorn consolidou o casal MichaelTopTen. Em 2025, ele expandiu seu portfólio para o gênero de suspense sobrenatural com o papel de Say em "Goddess Bless You from Death".
data.name: Michael Kiettisak Vatanavitsakul

data.biography:
Michael Imperioli (born March 26, 1966) is an American actor. He is best known for his roles as Christopher Moltisanti in the HBO crime drama series The Sopranos (1999–2007), which earned him the Primetime Emmy Award for Outstanding Supporting Actor in a Drama Series in 2004, and as Dominic Di Grasso in the HBO comedy drama series The White Lotus in 2022.

Description above from the Wikipedia article Michael Imperioli, licensed under CC-BY-SA, full list of contributors on Wikipedia.
data.name: Michael Imperioli

data.biography: 詹姆斯·迈克尔·因佩里奥利（James Michael Imperioli，1966年3月26日-），俗称迈克尔·因佩里奥利，意大利裔美国演员和电视编剧。他最出名的可能是在《黑道家族》中饰演克里斯托弗·莫尔蒂桑蒂，并因此获得了 2004 年黄金时段艾美奖剧情类剧集杰出男配角奖。他还在电视连续剧《法律与秩序》中饰演艾德·格林的临时替代者尼克·法尔科。Imperioli 在 2008-2009 年的电视季中在美国版的《火星生活》中饰演侦探雷·卡林。他在 ABC 新警匪剧《底特律 1-8-7》中饰演侦探路易斯·费奇，直到该剧被取消。
data.name: 詹姆斯·因佩里奥利

data.biography: Джеймс Майкл Империоли - американский актёр, наиболее известный как исполнитель роли Кристофера «Крисси» Молтисанти в криминально-драматическом телесериале канала HBO «Клан Сопрано». Лауреат премии «Эмми» (2004), трёхкратный обладатель премии Гильдии киноактёров Америки (1999, 2007, 2023) и двукратный номинант на премию «Золотой глобус» (2003, 2005).
data.name: Майкл Империоли

data.biography: 麥克·邁克爾·因佩里奧利（James Michael Imperioli，1966 年 3 月 26 日-），俗稱邁克爾·因佩里奧利，義大利裔美國演員和電視編劇。他最出名的可能是在《黑道家族》中飾演克里斯託弗·莫爾蒂桑蒂，並因此獲得了 2004 年黃金時段艾美獎劇情類劇集傑出男配角獎。他還在電視聯續劇《法律與秩序》中飾演艾德·格林的臨時替代者尼克·法爾科。Imperioli 在 2008 - 2009 年的電視季中在美國版的《火星生活》中飾演偵探雷·卡林。他在 ABC 新警匪劇《底特律 1 - 8 - 7》中飾演偵探路易斯·費奇，直到該劇被取消。
data.name: 麥克·英普雷歐裏

data.biography:
Theodore Martin 'Ted' McGinley (born May 30, 1958) is an American actor. He is known for his roles as Jefferson D'Arcy on the television sitcom Married... with Children, and as Charley Shanowski on the ABC sitcom Hope & Faith. He was a late regular on Happy Days, Dynasty and The Love Boat and is known for playing the villainous role of Stan Gable in the film Revenge of the Nerds and in several made-for-television sequels.

He has been married to actress Gigi Rice since 1991.
data.name: Ted McGinley
テッド・マッギンレー

data.biography: Luis Tosar (born 13 October 1971) is a Galician actor. Born in Cospeito, Galicia, Spain, on 13th October 1971, he is best known internationally for his villain role in Miami Vice.
data.name: Luis Tosar

data.biography:
Luis López Tosar (Lugo, Octubre 1971) actor español, más conocido como Luis Tosar, y cantante del grupo Di Elas.  A finales de los noventa se da a conocer con series de tv como la gallega Mareas Vivas, o en películas como Celos (Vicente Aranda) , La comunidad (Álex de la Iglesia ) o Flores de otro mundo (Icíar Bollaín ) que le valió una nominación a los Goya como mejor actor revelación.

Sería en 2003 cuando por su papel de Jose en Los Lunes al sol (Fernando León de Aranoa) ganaría su primer Goya y múltiples reconocimientos. Le seguiría La flaqueza del bolchevique  (Manuel Martín Cuenca) y Te doy mis ojos (Icíar Bollaín), por el que obtendría su segundo Goya, entre otros premios, por su papel de Antonio y cuyo origen fue el corto Amores que matan donde la directora madrileña aborda la violencia de género.

Ganaría su tercer Goya, gracias a Mala Madre en Celda 211 de Daniel Monzón . Volvería a trabajar con el director en El Niño (2014) y Yucatán (2018).

Sus papeles en Mientras duermes o Musarañas consigue inquietar al espectador con el cariz solitario y sombrío con el que matiza su actuación.

Versátil como pocos, Luis Tosar ha protagonizado papeles muy dispares, donde consiguen atrapar al espectador,  en títulos como Toro (2016, Kike Maíllo), Plan de fuga (Iñaki Dorronsoro), 1898. Los últimos de Filipinas (Salvador Calvo) o Cien años de perdón (Daniel Calparsoro)

Ventajas de viajar en tren (Aritz Moreno) o Quien a hierro mata (Paco Plaza), papel en esta última que  le ha otorgado una nueva nominación como mejor actor en los Premios Goya 2020.

En Maixabel de nuevo junto a Icíar Bollaín, una historia basada en hechos reales donde se mete en la piel de un terrorista preso que recibe la visita de una de sus victimas, Maixabel Lasa (Blanca Portillo). Una película no exenta de polémica, que es una firme candidata para los Premios Goya 2022.

Actuó también en la opera prima de Daniel Guzmán A cambio de nada, película que atravesó muchas dificultades durante el rodaje y que vio sus frutos con sendos reconocimientos.

Además del cine español, ha particiado en producciones estadounidenses como Corrupción en Miami (Miami Vice, Michael Mann) o The limits of Control, esta última junto a Tilda Swinton o en el doblaje de videojuegos como Assassin's Creed III o en Destiny 2.

Celoso de su vida privada, en la actualidad mantiene una relación con la actriz chilena María Luisa Mayol con la que tiene dos hijos.

Sin duda alguna es un actor carismático como pocos,  lo que ha hecho que se convierta en un imprescindible del cine español.

Luis López Tosar, simplement appelé Luis Tosar, est un acteur, producteur, scénariste et chanteur espagnol, né le 13 octobre 1971 à Cospeito (Galice).

Luis Tosar débute en tant qu'acteur dans des courts métrages. En parallèle, il fait des petites apparitions à la télévision. La série Riptide (1998) lui assure la renommée en Galice et lui ouvre les portes du 7e art.

Luis Tosar a plus de trente films à son actif. Il interprète souvent des personnages en prise avec la réalité quotidienne, actifs, révoltés et parfois menaçants comme le chômeur des Lundis au soleil (Los lunes al sol), le cadre agressif de Casual Day , ou le détenu mutin, brutal et dangereux de Cellule 211 (Celda 211). En 2003, il reçoit le Goya du meilleur second rôle pour Los lunes al sol. L'année suivante, il est élu « Meilleur acteur » aux Goyas, décernés par l’Académie des arts et des sciences cinématographiques d'Espagne. Cette récompense couronne sa prestation en mari violent dans Ne dis rien (Te doy mis ojos). En 2006, il apparaît dans le remake cinématographique réalisé par Michael Mann de la série des années 1980 Miami Vice : Deux Flics à Miami avec Colin Farrell et Jamie Foxx. En 2009, il tourne dans les studios de la Ville de Lumière d'Alicante, pour le film anglais Mr. Nice avec Rhys Ifans, Chloë Sevigny, David Thewlis et l’actrice espagnole Elsa Pataky.

En 2010, il obtient le troisième Goya de sa carrière (et son second trophée pour le meilleur premier rôle) grâce à son interprétation de Malamadre dans Cellule 211.

Contenu soumis à la licence CC-BY-SA 3.0. Source : Article Luis Tosar de Wikipédia en français.

data.biography:
Luis Tosar, geboren am 13. Oktober 1971 in Xustás, Galicien, ist ein renommierter spanischer Schauspieler, der vor allem für seine intensiven und vielschichtigen Rollen bekannt ist. Seine Karriere begann er mit der galicischen Fernsehserie Mareas Vivas (1998), die ihm erste Bekanntheit in seiner Heimat verschaffte. Im Kino wurde er durch Filme wie Blumen aus einer anderen Welt (1999), Montags in der Sonne (2002), Öffne meine Augen (2003) und vor allem Zelle 211 – Der Knastaufstand (2009) international bekannt.

Tosar hat mehrere Goya-Preise gewonnen, darunter zweimal als bester Hauptdarsteller und einmal als bester Nebendarsteller, was seine hohe Anerkennung in der spanischen Filmbranche unterstreicht. Er ist für seine Fähigkeit bekannt, komplexe und oft düstere Charaktere überzeugend darzustellen, etwa in Thriller-Filmen wie Sleep Tight (2011) und Shrew’s Nest (2014).

Neben der Schauspielerei ist Luis Tosar auch als Sänger und Gitarrist der Band „Di Elas“ aktiv, die 2012 ihr erstes Album veröffentlichte. Er ist verheiratet mit María Luisa Mayol und hat zwei Kinder.

Alan Chui Chung-San (Chinese: 徐忠信) was a Hong Kong actor, director, choreographer, martial artist and stuntman. He was known for being an action director and stuntman. Chui was known for films such as The Rebellious Reign, Kung Fu Vs. Yoga, Two Fists Against the Law and 7 Grandmasters; as well as other various Taiwanese television shows.
data.name: Alan Chui Chung-San

data.biography: 徐忠信是香港武打演员及武术指导，1960年代入行，1970年代开始长期在香港无线电视剧集和电影作品中担任武术指导工作至今。除从事武指工作外，徐忠信亦曾多次在电视剧及电影中演出，主要演绎黑社会大佬、武林高手等类型的角色。
data.name: 徐忠信

data.biography: 徐忠信是香港武打演員及武術指導，1960 年代入行，1970 年代開始長期在香港無線電視劇集和電影作品中擔任武術指導工作至今。除從事武指工作外，徐忠信亦曾多次在電視劇及電影中演出，主要演繹黑社會大佬、武林高手等類型的角色。
data.name: 徐忠信

data.biography:
Jasmin Savoy Brown (born March 21, 1994) is an American actress. She has appeared in the HBO mystery drama series The Leftovers (2015–2017), the ABC legal drama series For the People (2018–2019), and the Showtime psychological drama series Yellowjackets (2021–present).

Brown also acted in Sound of Violence (2021) and Scream (2022). She provided the voice and motion capture for Phin Mason / Tinkerer in the video game Spider-Man: Miles Morales (2020).
data.name: Jasmin Savoy Brown

data.biography:
Jasmin Savoy Brown（1994年3月21日-），美国女演员。她曾出演 HBO 悬疑剧集《剩菜》（2015-2017 年）、ABC 法律剧集《为人民》（2018-2019 年）和 Showtime 心理剧集《黄夹克》（2021 年至今）。

布朗还出演了《暴力之声》（2021 年）和《惊声尖叫》（2022 年）。她在视频游戏《蜘蛛侠：迈尔斯·莫拉莱斯》（2020 年）中为 Phin Mason / Tinkerer 提供语音和动作捕捉。
data.name: 贾思敏·萨沃伊·布朗
ジャスミン・サボイ・ブラウン

data.biography:
Jasmin Savoy Brown（1994 年 3 月 21 日-），美國女演員。她曾出演 HBO 懸疑劇集《剩菜》（2015 - 2017 年）、ABC 法律劇集《為人民》（2018 - 2019 年）和 Showtime 心理劇集《黃夾克》（2021 年至今）。

布朗還出演了《暴力之聲》（2021 年）和《奪命狂呼 5》（2022 年）。她在視頻遊戲《蜘蛛俠：邁爾斯·莫拉萊斯》（2020 年）中為 Phin Mason / Tinkerer 提供語音和動作捕捉。
data.name: 賈思敏·薩沃伊·布朗

data.biography: Oh Yeon-seo (오연서), born Oh Haet-nim (오햇님), is a South Korean actress and former member of the girl group LUV.
data.name: Oh Yeon-seo

data.biography:
吴涟序（韩语：오 연 서，1987年6月22日－）是韩国的演员与歌手，又译名字「吴妍书」2002年吴涟序以本名吴寒妮（ 오 햇 님 ）成为3人女子组合【LUV】（赵银星、全慧彬、吴寒妮）的成员并发行正规1辑《Story》，1辑活动后组合解散，转往戏剧发展。演员时期  2003年以本名吴寒妮转向戏剧发展，在KBS《玉琳成长日记1》等的青春电视剧中演出，2007年改名为吴涟序，十年的默默无闻，2012年透过电视剧《顺藤而上的你》而人气急升。并获得新人奖。

2013年，于电视剧《吴子龙走吧》首度担任女主角就取得收视冠军的好成绩。获得新人奖和人气明星奖。并获得其他导演称赞表现得非常出色。2013年，在女大生票选最有好感艺人排名，排名第一，人气居高不下，同年拿下人气明星奖。2013年，对满19岁的男女1214人进行调查,结果电视剧《吴子龙走吧》最受喜爱度排名第一。

2014年，凭借着电视剧《来了！张宝利》的40%收视率，掀起了「张宝利」的收看狂潮。

2015年，主演辉煌或疯狂,再度引领收视率,收视冠军。人气再度急升。

2016年，凭借《回来吧大叔》再度拿下人气明星奖和最优秀演技奖。

2017年，凭借花游记，在几百名的演员评价中，上榜演员评价第六

2019年，有瑕疵的人们，在几百名的演员评价中，上榜演员评价榜排行前三。

教育程度	东国大学戏剧电影学学士 出道日期	2002年，​19年前 出道作品	歌手LUV 1辑（Story）

演员KBS2《玉琳的成长日记1》代表作品	《顺藤而上的你》《来了！张宝利》《我的野蛮公主》《花游记》《有瑕疵的人们》活跃年代	2002年－至今  经纪公司	Sidus HQ 相关团体	LUV
data.name: 吴涟序

data.biography:
Oh Yeon Seo je jihokorejská herečka, která je známá především díky hlavní roli v dramatu "Jang Bo Ri Is Here", za kterou získala ocenění Top Excellence Awards na 7. ročníku Korea Drama Awards a MBC Drama Awards 2014. Pod svým skutečným jménem Oh Haet Nim debutovala v roce 2002 ve věku 16 let s dívčí K-popovou skupinou LUV. Po půl roce přešla k herectví a modelingu a objevila se v mnoha filmech a televizních seriálech. Za role v seriálech " My Husband Got a Family" a "Here Comes Mr. Oh" z roku 2012 získala ocenění "Nejlepší nová herečka" a v roce 2016 "Nejlepší herečka" za seriál "Please Come Back, Mister".

V roce 2009 získala Oh na 4. ročníku Asia Model Festival Awards cenu CF Model Award. Nadále působí jako modelka pro módní produkty a ambasadorka produktů péče o pleť AHC. Byla na obálkách a objevila se v mnoha časopisech. V roce 2016 získala na Asia Model Awards cenu za popularitu (žena).

Oh se angažuje v charitativních organizacích pro humánní zacházení se zvířaty a Červený kříž. Jako dlouholetá dárkyně Korejského červeného kříže se připojila k mnoha dalším celebritám, které věnovaly finanční prostředky pro oběti a rodiny katastrofy trajektu Sewol. Údajně věnovala 10 milionů KRW. V roce 2013 byla jmenována velvyslankyní Červeného kříže. V roce 2013 byla jmenována velvyslankyní prvního ročníku filmového festivalu o zvířatech v Suncheonu, aby pomohla zvýšit povědomí o právech a životních podmínkách zvířat.

吳漣序（오연서，Oh Yeon-seo）是韓國的演員與歌手。早期以本名「吳햇님」出道，意思為「陽光」，2007年改名為「吳漣序」，名字取自水面小波紋之「漣」、順序之「序」，有像流水般一步步成長之意。早期音譯為「吳妍書」，2008年《Movieweek》（무비위크）雜誌翻譯其漢字名為「吳漣序」；2012年於節目《強心臟》中解釋名字含義，漢字寫作「吳漣序」。2022年，車庫娛樂向韓方求證，正名為「吳漣序」。韓國國立中央圖書館將其漢字記作「吳漣序」。
data.name: 吳漣序

data.biography: 吳漣序（오연서，Oh Yeon - seo）是韓國的演員與歌手。早期以本名「吳햇님」出道，意思為「陽光」，2007 年改名為「吳漣序」，名字取自水面小波紋之「漣」、順序之「序」，有像流水般一步步成長之意。早期音譯為「吳妍書」，2008 年《Movieweek》（무비위크）雜誌翻譯其漢字名為「吳漣序」；2012 年於節目《強心臟》中解釋名字含義，漢字寫作「吳漣序」。2022 年，車庫娛樂向韓方求證，正名為「吳漣序」。韓國國立中央圖書館將其漢字記作「吳漣序」。
data.name: 吳漣序

data.biography:
Johnny Yong Bosch (born January 6, 1976, Kansas City, Missouri) is an American actor, voice actor, martial artist, and musician.

He may be best-known for portraying Lelouch Lamperouge in Code Geass: Lelouch of the Rebellion, Adam Park in Mighty Morphin Power Rangers, and being the English voice of Ichigo Kurosaki in the hit anime series Bleach and Vash the Stampede in Trigun. He is also a two time American Anime Award nominee.

He also voiced in the English Dub Anime TV shows including Sailor Moon 1992-1997 as Artemis in the Viz Media redubbed English version and in Doraemon 2005 TV series as Noby.

Description above from the Wikipedia article Johnny Yong Bosch, licensed under CC-BY-SA, full list of contributors on Wikipedia.
data.name: Johnny Yong Bosch

data.biography: 白文彪，男，粤剧演员、教师。原名招鸿福。上世纪40年代即从事粤剧艺术工作。50年代白文彪加入电影娱乐圈，任编剧及副导演，曾与导演李翰祥拍摄多部经典名剧。之后他加盟香港无线电视，曾与周润发、汪明荃、郑裕玲等影视红星合作，出演《家变》、《奋斗》、《射雕英雄传》等多部经典剧集。白文彪戏路广阔，很受观众欢迎，是著名一线演员
data.name: 白文彪

data.biography: 白文彪，男，粵劇演員、教師。原名招鴻福。上世紀 40 年代即從事粵劇藝術工作。50 年代白文彪加入電影娛樂圈，任編劇及副導演，曾與導演李翰祥拍攝多部經典名劇。之後他加盟香港無線電視，曾與周潤發、汪明荃、鄭裕玲等影視紅星合作，出演《家變》、《奮鬥》、《射鵰英雄傳》等多部經典劇集。白文彪戲路廣闊，很受觀眾歡迎，是著名一線演員
data.name: 白文彪

data.biography:
付嘉（Fingal）中国内地影视男演员，毕业于中国戏曲学院影视表演专业。

2013年，出演个人首部微电影《遇见你》，从而正式进入演艺圈  。2015年，主演青春励志网络剧《我的奇妙男友；同年，因在都市情感剧《爱人的谎言》中饰演关宇而获得更多关注  。2016年，主演古装玄幻剧《择天记》。2017年，主演的电视剧《寻人大师》播出  。2018年，主演电视剧《唐诗三百案》，饰演男一号李墨白  。2019年，主演的电视剧《我的奇妙男友2》播出 ；同年，参演的电视剧《天下无诈》在北京卫视播出  。2020年3月，主演的都市时尚青春剧《抬头有星光》播出 [9]  ，同年9月，参演的都市爱情剧《我，喜欢你》播出。
data.name: 付嘉

data.biography:
付嘉（Fingal）中國內地影視男演員，畢業於中國戲曲學院影視表演專業。

2013 年，出演個人首部微電影《遇見你》，從而正式進入演藝圈 。2015 年，主演青春勵志網絡劇《我的奇妙男友；同年，因在都市情感劇《愛人的謊言》中飾演關宇而獲得更多關注 。2016 年，主演古裝玄幻劇《擇天記》。2017 年，主演的電視劇《尋人大師》播出 。2018 年，主演電視劇《唐詩三百案》，飾演男一號李墨白 。2019 年，主演的電視劇《我的奇妙男友 2》播出 ；同年，參演的電視劇《天下無詐》在北京衞視播出 。2020 年 3 月，主演的都市時尚青春劇《抬頭有星光》播出 ，同年 9 月，參演的都市愛情劇《我，喜歡你》播出。
data.name: 付嘉

data.overview: Khi cuộc sống yên bình của cô trên một hòn đảo hẻo lánh bị phá vỡ bởi sự trở lại của viên thuyền trưởng cũ đầy thù hận, một nữ cướp biển lão luyện buộc phải đối mặt với quá khứ đẫm máu và tung ra những kỹ năng chết chóc của mình để cứu gia đình khỏi cuộc bao vây tàn bạo.
data.title: Cú Lừa

data.overview: Sau khi được ra tù, một người cha cố gắng hàn gắn lại mối quan hệ với con gái bằng cách đưa cô đi tham quan trường đại học, nhưng họ sớm nhận ra mình đang phải chiến đấu vì nhiều thứ hơn là chỉ mối quan hệ đã mất khi một giáo phái sát nhân truy đuổi họ.
data.title: Một Dặm Định Mệnh: Khởi Đầu

data.biography: Tiffany Sarac Haddish (born December 3, 1979) is an American comedian and actress. After guest starring on several television series, Haddish gained prominence as Jackie on the first season of the OWN television drama If Loving You Is Wrong from 2014 to 2015. From 2015 to 2017, she starred as Nekeisha Williams on the NBC sitcom The Carmichael Show. After appearing in the 2016 comedy film Keanu, Haddish made her film breakthrough as Dina in the 2017 film Girls Trip, for which she received critical acclaim. In 2018, Haddish was included on Time's annual list of the 100 most influential people in the world.
data.name: Tiffany Haddish

data.biography: Tiffany Sarac Haddish (geboren am 3. Dezember 1979) ist eine amerikanische Komikerin und Schauspielerin. Nachdem sie in mehreren Fernsehserien Gastauftritte hatte, erlangte Haddish Bekanntheit als Jackie in der ersten Staffel des OWN-Fernsehdramas If Loving You Is Wrong von 2014 bis 2015. Von 2015 bis 2017 spielte sie die Rolle der Nekeisha Williams in der NBC-Sitcom The Carmichael Show. Nach ihrem Auftritt in der Komödie Keanu aus dem Jahr 2016 gelang Haddish der Durchbruch im Filmgeschäft als Dina im Film Girls Trip von 2017, für den sie von Kritikern gelobt wurde. 2018 wurde Haddish in die jährliche Liste der 100 einflussreichsten Menschen der Welt des Time-Magazins aufgenommen.
蒂凡尼·哈迪斯，美国著名非裔女演员。主要作品有《算牌人》。
data.name: 蒂凡尼·哈迪斯

data.biography: Tiffany Sara Cornilia Haddish (née le 3 décembre 1979) est une est une humoriste, actrice et scénariste américaine. Après avoir joué dans plusieurs séries télévisées, Tiffany s'est fait connaître en tant que Jackie lors de la première saison du drame télévisé OWN If Loving You Is Wrong de 2014 à 2015. De 2015 à 2017, elle a joué le rôle de Nekeisha Williams dans la sitcom NBC The Carmichael Show . Après être apparue dans le film comique de 2016 Keanu, Tiffany a fait sa percée cinématographique en tant que Dina dans le film Girls Trip de 2017, pour lequel elle a été acclamé par la critique. En 2018, Tiffany figurait sur la liste annuelle de Time des 100 personnes les plus influentes au monde.

data.biography:
Gavin J. Konop is a writer, director, and editor born in Upland, California. Fascinated by fiction, Konop often attributes his initial joy to the escapism of storytelling, noting that it offered "a sense of safety and security" when it was needed most.

He attended Rancho Cucamonga High School and was an active participant in the school's TV / Video program led by Matthew Cataldo, who Konop credits for his experience in filmmaking. Gavin built his way up to becoming a leader of the class, often steering the production of school rally videos, sports highlights, and ongoing events on campus. Accompanying him as notable peers in the class were Evan Jackson, Gabe Combalacer, Aiden Saldaña, and Austin Santibañez, all of whom have continued to aid Konop in his filmmaking journey.

He still contributes to the class, often returning to campus and encouraging students who are aspiring filmmakers. He speaks highly of his experience, and his peers have expressed admiration for his growth over the years.

Gavin describes his early high school years as 'misguided' and frequently reflects on them in public recounts. He remarks that his first film was born during a time of heavy reflection, and, according to an interview with the New York Times, he was "going through a rough patch in life - his grades were dipping, and his friendships strained" during his junior year, leading to the creation of his first film, 'Spider-Man: Lotus'. Gavin has explained the discoveries he made as a result of hardship:

"...as I began to discover my philosophies and morals, and started to grow into who I am today, I found that fiction can exist for much more than simple escapism - it can inspire us. It can uplift us. It can place a magnifying glass on the world, and be a guiding light that gives us the power to stand against the difficulties that unveil."

Motivated by a newfound outlook on storytelling, he pursued full throttle on his first movie, taking on the role of writer, director, editor, producer, and even jobs such as visual effects and sound design. Nearly four years were spent on the creation, spanning from January 2020 to August 2023, and it premiered in Los Angeles to over 1,200 attendees at the Million Dollar Theater. Its release was met with divisive reactions online - some critiquing its slow pacing and deviation from the comic book genre, while others commended it for its slow and emotional approach to the character. Konop remains optimistic about its completion, explaining on his Instagram story, "I got to make the movie I wanted, exactly how I wanted to make it. If people didn't like it, I respect it. But I'm beyond satisfied with how it turned out. And I'll always look back on it fondly."

Konop has now pivoted to the indie filmmaking community, where his newest horror-comedy short, "Attempted Murder", has begun its festival run, so far accumulating six awards. The film is expected to release on YouTube in Fall 2025. Additionally, he has produced / directed several other shorts and music videos, and is expected to graduate from UC Riverside in Spring 2026.
data.name: Gavin J. Konop

data.original_title: อนงค์ 2..สามสี่ชาติ
data.overview: Khép lại những trang hồi ức của 'My Boo', Jo trở về tiếp quản ngôi nhà cổ - nơi từng chứng kiến cuộc gặp gỡ định mệnh giữa anh và bé ma Anong, linh hồn vẫn luôn vương vấn sau những bức tường cũ kỹ. Tình yêu của họ từng chớm nở rực rỡ nhưng lại kết thúc với sự cách biệt âm dương. Tưởng chừng mọi chuyện đã ngủ yên dưới lớp bụi thời gian, cho đến khi một kẻ lạ mặt đầy bí ẩn xuất hiện. Hắn trao cho Jo cơ hội ngược dòng luân hồi, để anh tận mắt chứng kiến những tiền kiếp xa xăm mà mình và Anong từng chung bước. Kiếp yêu đầu tiên, Anong là một nữ chiến binh quả cảm. Kiếp yêu thứ hai, họ lại kề vai sát cánh giữa những vụ án tâm linh đầy rẫy hiểm nguy. Dẫu thời đại xoay vần, hình hài thay đổi, họ vẫn tìm thấy nhau, vẫn yêu và cùng nhau đối diện với định mệnh nghiệt ngã. Bởi giữa Jo và Anong là một sợi dây nhân duyên bền chặt, đan dệt qua hàng thế kỷ, kết nối họ xuyên qua mọi kiếp nhân sinh.
data.title: Bé Ghệ Ma Cưng
